user.title: Configure Xiaomi Air Purifier
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Xiaomi device.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your Xiaomi device.
data_description.token: The 32-character token for device authentication. You can obtain this using various methods described in the documentation.
data_description.name: A friendly name for the device.
data_description.model: The device model. Leave empty for auto-detection.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Xiaomi Air Purifier
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your Xiaomi device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Please check the host and token.
